title: City Map Overlay: Visualize District Interactions in CodeGrind
summary: Spotlighting the revamped CityMap and scene components with a focus on District 01 interactions and cyberpunk city visuals. A static, announcement-style post highlighting UI and scene upgrades.
core_message: CodeGrind now features enhanced CityMap and CityScene components that improve scene management for District 01, delivering a richer cyberpunk city experience and clearer walking interactions.
cta: Explore the District 01 update in CodeGrind and try the improved CityMap experience today.
visual_brief: Static announcement-style image showing the cyberpunk District 01 city map with glowing routes, CityMap and CityScene panels visible, subtle UI elements, and an overlay caption: 'District 01 CityMap & Scene Update'.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
